design_philosophy.core_loop: Select wrestler with unique moveset, enter ring against opponent, manage stamina bar, chain attacks to deplete opponent stamina and secure pinfall victory
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Stamina depletion creates vulnerability windows; opponent becomes dangerous when exhausted
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Embody iconic WWF wrestler (or create custom 'Yourself' character) to defeat all competitors and become champion
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: High-angle isometric view emphasizes ring positioning and stamina management over button-mashing; each wrestler has distinctly small but unique movesets forcing character specialization rather than one-character dominance

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players select wrestler with different moveset depth and speed; championship mode requires sequential victories suggesting escalating opponent difficulty

progression.unlock_mechanism: Championship mode forces player-controlled 'Yourself' character to defeat all nine game wrestlers sequentially
replayability_hooks: Nine distinct wrestlers with unique movesets encourage replay with different characters
Two-player tag team championship mode with custom 'Yourself' variants
Multiple match types: one-on-one, tag team, three-on-three Survivor Series elimination
NPC partner control mechanics in team modes add tactical variety

world_building_techniques: Licensed WWF roster (Hulk Hogan, André the Giant, Ultimate Warrior, etc.) carries cultural wrestling narrative
Championship progression mode mimics tournament structure familiar to WWF viewers

boss_design.philosophy: Each wrestler functions as distinct boss encounter with specialized moveset; championship mode treats final opponents as progressively dangerous encounters

faction_indicators: WWF roster carries real-world wrestling faction identity (Hogan as megastar hero, André as monster threat)
Tag team modes emphasize partner loyalty mechanics
danger_signals: André the Giant positioned as monolithic threat (historically dominant opponent)
Stamina exhaustion creates desperation windows where opponent becomes most dangerous
environmental_storytelling: Isometric ring view with visible apron and stamina bars creates authentic wrestling broadcast perspective
Two-player custom 'Yourself' characters with unique theme songs allow social identity expression

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor) - developer/publisher metadata, regional differences, series context
wikipedia - gameplay mechanics, match types, wrestler roster, composition credits (Tim Stamper designer, David Wise composer)
